title: Circle Surges the Most Since IPO After Results Top Estimates
description: Shares of Circle Internet Group Inc. jumped 35%, the most since its high-profile public debut last year, after the company said strong demand for its stablecoin bolstered profit and revenue during the fourth-quarter downturn in digital assets.
content: Shares of Circle Internet Group Inc. jumped 35%, the most since its high-profile public debut last year, after the company said strong demand for its stablecoin bolstered profit and revenue during the fourth-quarter downturn in digital assets.
